message:
feat(messaging): add FABRIC subject-fabric foundation modules

Introduce the full set of messaging subsystem modules that form the
foundation of the brokerless Semantic Subject Fabric (FABRIC) design.
These modules implement:

- Subject-cell placement and deterministic partitioning (fabric.rs)
- Delivery-class taxonomy with named lanes (class.rs)
- Capability-based routing tokens and access control (capability/)
- Protocol definition and session lifecycle (protocol/, session/)
- Stream semantics, snapshot, and cut primitives for exactly-once
  delivery guarantees (stream.rs, snapshot.rs, cut.rs)
- Federation, morphism, and IR modules for cross-region message
  transformation and schema evolution (federation.rs, morphism.rs, ir.rs)
- Policy, privacy, and control modules for governance and observability
  (policy.rs, privacy.rs, control.rs)
- Compiler and explain modules for subject-pattern compilation and
  query plan introspection (compiler.rs, explain.rs)
- Consumer and service abstractions for downstream subscription
  binding (consumer.rs, service.rs)

All modules are gated behind the messaging-fabric feature flag.
This is scaffold-phase code establishing the type-level contracts
that later implementation work will build on.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+//! Capability-aware routing placeholders.
+
+/// Stub anchor for future capability-checked routing policies.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Default)]
+pub struct CapabilityRoutingPlaceholder {
+    /// Human-readable routing policy name.
+    pub name: String,
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+//! Capability token placeholders.
+
+/// Stub anchor for future publish-permit and lease tokens.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Default)]
+pub struct PublishPermitPlaceholder {
+    /// Human-readable token family.
+    pub family: String,
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@

+
+/// Stub anchor for the future FABRIC intent compiler.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Default)]
+pub struct FabricCompilerPlaceholder;

@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+//! Federation-role placeholders.
+
+/// Top-level federation roles reserved by the FABRIC design.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash)]
+pub enum FederationRole {
+    /// Constrained leaf fabric.
+    LeafFabric,
+    /// Gateway between fabrics.
+    GatewayFabric,
+    /// Replication-oriented bridge.
+    ReplicationLink,
+    /// Replay- and evidence-oriented bridge.
+    EdgeReplayLink,
+}
